shared_properties: 120x180 frame size and academy coat silhouette.
Gold trim lines, navy robe body, and cyan focus gem placement.
Rightward facing stance rooted to the same platform origin as idle.
differences: Guard arm sweeps outward by about 34 px to open the return path.
Cyan shield arc expands around the forearm and chest.
Coat hem and sash trail backward to show recoil from a successful parry.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the success state and let gameplay advance the non-looping animation once per reflect event.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_student_reflect_success_6f_14fps.png through AssetServer and cache the atlas handle under player_student_reflect_success_6f_14fps.
runtime_notes: Success animation returns to idle when the sixth frame completes.
Shield arc alpha blending must remain clear over the lane overlay.
Combo UI can trigger at frame 4 without hiding the arm silhouette.

context.usage: Shown when the reflect input lands inside the good or perfect window and the projectile reverses direction.

shape.silhouette: Expanded player silhouette with a broad arm sweep and a crescent shield arc.

appendages.accessories: Focus bracer glow, crest brooch, and trailing sash.

specs.texture: Cloth folds stretch outward from the shoulder and the shield arc carries glossy magical highlights.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with strong cyan bloom along the shield arc.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 720x180 px with six 120x180 frames.
Shield arc reaches its widest span in frame 3 and stays fully inside the frame bounds.
Success pose reads as a forward counter motion without moving the planted foot more than 8 px.
